Find sources: "Luc Zoa" news newspapers books scholar JSTOR June 2014 Learn how and when to remove this message .mw-parser-output .infobox-subbox .mw-parser-output .infobox-3cols-child .mw-parser-output .infobox .navbar screen screen and prefers-color-scheme:dark min-width:640px body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table caption body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table tbody body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table th,body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table td Luc Zoa Personal information Full name Luc Owona Zoa Date of birth 1979-01-23 23 January 1979 age 47 Place of birth Yaoundé , Cameroon Height 1.85 m 6 ft 1 in Position Defender Senior career Years Team Apps Gls 1997 Renaissance de Ngoumou 1998 Victoria United Limbé 1999 Cintra Yaoundé 2000 2001 Coyotes de Saltillo 2001 2003 Orlando Pirates 34 0 2004 2005 Spartak Moscow 3 0 2005 Anzhi Makhachkala loan 21 1 2006 2007 Anzhi Makhachkala 54 0 2011 2012 Persisam Putra Samarinda 26 1 Total 138 2 Club domestic league appearances and goals Luc Owona Zoa born January 23, 1979 is a former Cameroonian footballer. Career edit Zoa played as a central defender for C.F. Monterrey 's affiliate Coyotes de Saltillo in the Primera A until 2001. 1 He also played in the Premier Soccer League for Orlando Pirates . 2 Zoa made three Russian Premier League appearances for FC Spartak Moscow , 3 before going on loan to Russian First Division side FC Anzhi Makhachkala . 4 Honours edit Club honors edit Orlando Pirates Premier Soccer League 1 : 2002 03 citation needed
